urdu transliteration text:
Ask Sajjad!
Sajjad se poocho
Afsoos nabi zadiyoon ka Shaam may jana
english translation text: Unfortunate that the Prophet’s daughters had to go to Shaam

urdu transliteration text:
Ask Sajjad!
Sajjad se poocho
Sar nangay woh maa behnoon ka darbar may jana
english translation text: Without a head cover the mothers and sisters had to go in the court

urdu transliteration text:
Ask Sajjad!
Sajjad se poocho

Chupti thi nabi zadi, nabi zadi ke peechay
kis sharm-o-haya say
english translation text: Daughters of Mohammad used to hide behind each other, with such modesty

urdu transliteration text: Aur Shimr ka un bibiyoon kay naam batana
english translation text: And Shimr’s calling Bibis by their names

urdu transliteration text:
Ask Sajjad!
Sajjad se poocho

Baithay huay darbar may sab chootay baray thay
Sadaat Kharay thay
english translation text: Everyone was seated in the court, However, the Sadaat were standing

urdu transliteration text: Sar tasht may rakkha hua Zainab ko dikhana
english translation text: The head was kept on tray for Zainab to see

urdu transliteration text:
Ask Sajjad!
Sajjad se poocho
Jab dukhtaray Shabbir nay zindaan may qaza ki - aafat ki ghari thi
english translation text: When daughter of Shabbir died in the prison, it was a time of tribulations

urdu transliteration text:
Carrying the small mayyit with closed hands,
woh nanhi si mayyat bandhay hathon se uthana

Ask Sajjad!
Sajjad se poocho
Jab ghusl Sakina ko wahan day chuki ghassal - tha sab ka boora haal
english translation text: When the ghassal gave ghusl to Sakina,everybody was in grief,

urdu transliteration text: Us nanhi si mayyat par nishaan rassi ke paana
english translation text: Finding marks of ropes on this small corpse

urdu transliteration text:
Ask Sajjad!
Sajjad se poocho
Thi aik rasan bara aseeron kay galay thay - sab chupke kharay thay
english translation text: There was one rope on twelve prison’s necksEveryone was standing silently

urdu transliteration text:
Zainab came while tied in ropes
Rassi may bandhay Zainab-e-Kulsoom ka aana

Ask Sajjad!
Sajjad se poocho
Sar Hazrat-e-Muslim ka latakta tha jahan par - waan sheh ka ruka sar
english translation text: Where Muslim bin Aqeel’s head would hang, there Hussain’s head would stop

urdu transliteration text: Dur Abid-e-beemar ko us waqt lagana

Ask Sajjad!
Sajjad se poocho
Jab bali Sakina ko ghusl datay thay Sajjad - faryad hay faryad
english translation text: When Sajjad gave ghusul to Sakina,cry after cry could be heard

urdu transliteration text: Us nanhi si gardan pe nishaan rassi ke paana
english translation text: Finding marks of ropes on her little neck

urdu transliteration text:
Ask Sajjad!
Sajjad se poocho
Ghash kha ke giray Syed-e-Sajjad zameen par - barpa hua mehshar
english translation text: Overwhelmed, Sajjad fell on the ground,and the crowd gathered,

urdu transliteration text: Naizay ki ani se unhain us waqt uthana
english translation text: The spear … wake him at that time

urdu transliteration text:
Ask Sajjad!
Sajjad se poocho
Jab qaid-e-sitamgar se chutey Aal-e-payambar ek shor tha ghar-ghar
english translation text: When the family of the Prophet was freed from the prison, there was a cry, “Home, Home”

urdu transliteration text:
Come build eighteen beloveds’ graves
Aththara azeezon ki lahad aakey banana

Ask Sajjad!
Sajjad se poocho
Akbar jo girey ghodey se kahney lagey Shabbeer, beta teri taqdeer
english translation text: When akbar fell off his horse, Shabbir“My son, your legacy …

urdu transliteration text: Ek zalim-e-be deen ka yun naiza lagana
english translation text: A tyrant of no religion struck a spear in such manner

urdu transliteration text:
Ask Sajjad!
Sajjad se poocho
